summary: Lead Scoring Model feature comprehensive testing completed. All backend APIs (17 tests) and frontend UI verified working correctly. Default model seeded with 5 categories totaling 100 weight. Account scoring and Portfolio Matrix visualization functional.

success_rate.backend: 100% (15 passed, 2 skipped due to weight limit at 100)

seed_data_creation: Default scoring model seeded with 5 categories and test tiers. Test account scored at 100/100 in Stars quadrant.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead Scoring Model feature fully functional. Backend routes at /api/scoring/* all working. Frontend page at /lead-scoring-model with Configuration and Portfolio Matrix tabs. AccountScoringCard integrated into Account Detail page. Default model has 5 categories: Volume Potential (25pts), Margin Potential (20pts), Brand Prestige (20pts), Guest Influence (20pts), Sustainability Alignment (15pts) = 100 total. Taj Sarees account scored 100/100 in Stars quadrant.

scoring_model_api.details: GET /api/scoring/model returns model with 5 categories, total weight 100

seed_default_model.details: POST /api/scoring/seed-default-model creates 5 default categories with tiers

category_crud.details: Create/Update/Delete categories with weight validation (cannot exceed 100)

tier_crud.details: Add/Update/Delete tiers with score validation (cannot exceed category weight)

account_scoring.details: POST /api/scoring/accounts/{id}/score assigns tiers and calculates total score + quadrant

portfolio_matrix.details: GET /api/scoring/portfolio-matrix returns accounts grouped by quadrant (Stars, Showcase, Plough Horses, Puzzles)

lead_scoring_page.details: Page loads with Configuration and Portfolio Matrix tabs. Categories expandable with tier management.

account_scoring_card.details: AccountScoringCard component displays on Account Detail page with score, quadrant, and tier selection UI

sidebar_navigation.details: Lead Scoring Model link in Admin section of sidebar, correctly highlighted when active

authorization.details: Admin-only access enforced. CEO/Director/Admin roles can manage scoring model.
